name: testGenerateTokenAsTestAdmin
description: Generate API secret token as company admin
descriptionHtml: Generate API secret token as company admin

steps.name: Login to the site as 'Company admin' with 'testAdmin@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Generate API secret token as company admin

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' in the Header
Click 'Copy Business unit ID to clipboard' button
Click 'Copy secret token' icon in input
